title: Online Isha Upa Yoga for student mental health and well-being during COVID-19: A randomized control trial
headline: Online Isha Upa Yoga for student mental health and well-being during COVID-19: A randomized control trial
summary: A randomized controlled trial of yoga examined stress & anxiety. College students experienced increased stress and anxiety during the COVID-19 pandemic.
keyFindings: College students experienced increased stress and anxiety during the COVID-19 pandemic.
This study evaluated the effect of brief online Isha Upa Yoga modules on undergraduates' mental health and well-being.
limitations: Single-trial result; requires replication, and self-reported outcomes may inflate apparent effects.
The practice studied (yoga) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
